_note: Category-keyed hook-card text templates (implements wiki concepts/hook-engineering-2026-06). Used as a FALLBACK in Stage 6 so every clip gets a top-of-video hook card even when the vision model produced none (or grounding nulled it). A vision-generated hook always overrides these. Failure-soft: enabled=false or a missing file -> no template hook (current behavior). Keys are the moment's primary_category; 'default' covers anything unmapped. {title} is filled with the clip's short title when present; templates without slots are used verbatim. Keep hooks punchy (<= ~8 words / readable by the 3s mark). These are documented practitioner patterns, NOT individually retention-proven — rotate them and let a future calibration loop learn which land.
